steps.title: Express the quantities
steps.content: The number of $8$-inch parts is $n$. The number of $9$-inch parts is $4n$, and the number of $3$-inch parts is $15$.

steps.title: Add the total parts
steps.content:
The machine makes $100$ parts total, so add the three quantities.
$$4n+n+15=100$$
Combining like terms gives
$$5n+15=100$$
The answer is D.
